content:
# Seismic Imaging

**Summary**: The process of creating an image of the subsurface using seismic waves.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009]] focused on improving seismic-imaging by removing near-surface diffractions.

- [[2010-al-moqbel|Al-Moqbel, 2010]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2011-toma|Toma, 2011]] addressed issues in seismic-imaging caused by artificial cycle skips.

- [[2015-mohammed|Mohammed, 2015]] focused on improving seismic imaging in visco-acoustic media.

- [[2015-adetokunbo|Adetokunbo, 2015]] focused on the theme of seismic-imaging by developing improved 3D edge detection kernels.

- [[2018-abdulrahman|Abdulrahman, 2018]] investigated seismic imaging techniques for velocity determination.

- [[2018-mohamed|Mohamed, 2018]] evaluated FWI and RTM for imaging complex structures in arid environments.

- [[2020-abdallah-2|Abdallah, 2020]] focused on the challenges of seismic imaging in sub-salt environments.

- [[2023-muhammad|Muhammad, 2023]] focused on seismic-imaging by developing a more robust method for velocity estimation in the presence of statics.

- [[2024-jahlan|Jahlan, 2024]] focused on improving seismic imaging by removing artifacts caused by near-surface features like sand dunes.

## Key Subtopics

- [[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009]] ['shot gather analysis', 'diffraction mapping', 'attenuation']

- [[2010-al-moqbel|Al-Moqbel, 2010]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2011-toma|Toma, 2011]] addressed issues in seismic-imaging caused by artificial cycle skips.

- [[2015-mohammed|Mohammed, 2015]] focused on improving seismic imaging in visco-acoustic media.

- [[2015-adetokunbo|Adetokunbo, 2015]] focused on the theme of seismic-imaging by developing improved 3D edge detection kernels.

- [[2018-abdulrahman|Abdulrahman, 2018]] investigated seismic imaging techniques for velocity determination.

- [[2018-mohamed|Mohamed, 2018]] evaluated FWI and RTM for imaging complex structures in arid environments.

- [[2020-abdallah-2|Abdallah, 2020]] focused on the challenges of seismic imaging in sub-salt environments.

- [[2023-muhammad|Muhammad, 2023]] focused on seismic-imaging by developing a more robust method for velocity estimation in the presence of statics.

- [[2024-jahlan|Jahlan, 2024]] focused on improving seismic imaging by removing artifacts caused by near-surface features like sand dunes.

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009]] ['semblance measurement', 'Ricker wavelet fitting']

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Removing scattered surface waves significantly improved the continuity of reflectors in stacked data. ([[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009, p. 12]])

- Referenced in this thesis. ([[2010-al-moqbel|Al-Moqbel, 2010]])

- Artificial cycle skips can be misleading for interpreters and introduce false subsurface images. ([[2011-toma|Toma, 2011, p. 10]])

- Modified PSPI and non-reference assessment methods provide more accurate results than traditional subjective assessments. ([[2015-mohammed|Mohammed, 2015, p. 13]])

- Edge detection is one of the categories of geometric seismic attributes that has the capability to delineate vital information from seismic reflection data. ([[2015-adetokunbo|Adetokunbo, 2015, p. 30]])

- Both long and short offset methods provided similar accuracy in this specific study area. ([[2018-abdulrahman|Abdulrahman, 2018, p. 49]])

- RTM images showed a clear improvement of subsurface seismic image by using estimated FWI model. ([[2018-mohamed|Mohamed, 2018, p. 59]])

- Complex overburden structures like salt cause ray path distortion and poor illumination, necessitating advanced processing. ([[2020-abdallah-2|Abdallah, 2020, p. 15]])

- The proposed method provides an NMO velocity that is independent of initial incorrect values, improving imaging reliability. ([[2023-muhammad|Muhammad, 2023, p. 16]])

- Parallax methods improved the clarity of target reflections below dunes compared to standard processing. ([[2024-jahlan|Jahlan, 2024, p. 14]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009]] Near-surface diffractions masking deep reflections.
